problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
